title: Grilled Levantine Lamb Chops with Garnacha Glaze
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish that combines the richness of lamb with the bold flavors of the Mediterranean.
instructions: Season lamb chops with salt and black pepper.
In a small bowl, whisk together Levantine, garlic, lemon juice, and honey.
Brush lamb chops with olive oil and place on grill.
Grill lamb chops for 5-7 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
While lamb chops are cooking, reduce Garnacha glaze over medium heat until thickened.
Once lamb chops are cooked, brush with Garnacha glaze and let rest for 5 minutes.
Slice lamb chops and serve immediately.
